_comment: Copy this to cdk.context.json and edit the values for your environment.
_comment_region: AWS region. Defaults to us-west-2 if omitted.
_comment_hostname: Public hostname; you'll CNAME this to the ALB after deploy.
_comment_adminRoleArn: IAM role ARN granted cluster-admin via EKS access entry. This is the role your kubectl assumes.
_comment_awsProfile: AWS CLI profile name used in operator-facing output strings (kubectl update-kubeconfig hint, etc.). Cosmetic only.
_comment_imageRefs: Per-image OCI refs. Prefer immutable digests (@sha256:...) over tags; upstream GC's old tags.
_comment_nodeInstanceTypes: EC2 spot pool diversity. AMD64 because lenaxia/LLMSafeSpaces#462 (arm64 binary bug).
_comment_nodeSpot: Spot vs on-demand. Defaults to true for mvp, false for prod.
_comment_valkeyTls: Enable Valkey transit encryption + AUTH. Off until lenaxia/LLMSafeSpaces#465 ships TLS support in the chart's Redis client.
